content.text: Создай изображение .Вот требования к изображению:- что должно быть на изображении: https://284baef4-3d14-4ca5-8247-4811f0d6b14b.selstorage.ru/806548a2-ba8d-4d57-9c87-c09774554582_4141414.png Image #1: https://284baef4-3d14-4ca5-8247-4811f0d6b14b.selstorage.ru/8c6e16b1-e578-41a3-89c1-a93f4bf48f50_8d421716-117e-4d03-b15e-5a8b84f8ed82.png Recognised content of image [https://284baef4-3d14-4ca5-8247-4811f0d6b14b.selstorage.ru/8c6e16b1-e578-41a3-89c1-a93f4bf48f50_8d421716-117e-4d03-b15e-5a8b84f8ed82.png]: Certainly! Here’s a comprehensive and detailed description of the image: --- ### Central Composition - **Primary Object:** The main focus of the image is an abstract artistic representation of an eye. The eye is stylized rather than realistic, and its iris/pupil is replaced by the face of a clock. - **Clock Details:** - The clock face is circular and positioned at the very center of the eye. - The numbers around the clock face are Roman numerals (I to XII) and are colored in a pale yellow-gold shade. - The background insid... (litellm_truncated skipped 1034 chars) ...(mainly pink and purple) as the eye outlines and lashes, enhancing its integration into the overall image. ### Background - **Background Color:** - The background is a solid, deep black, which makes the neon colors of the eye and clock pop prominently. - There is a faint glow or mist effect around the eye, especially where the colors are most concentrated, adding to the ethereal, luminous quality of the artwork. ### Spatial Arrangement - **Central Position:** - The entire composition (eye + clock + text) is centered within the black background. - The eyelashes (spikes) radiate equally on both sides, with the text "ALARM" positioned just beneath the lower right edge of the eye. - The colored drips extend from the lower edge of the eye, adding a vertical element and directing focus downward. --- **Overall Impression:** The image merges surreal, dreamy aesthetics (neon gradients, glowing effects) with bold, edgy street art influences (spiky lines, graffiti-style text). The blending of the clock within the eye and the dripping effects evoke a sense of urgency, time, and perhaps anxiety, underscored by the word "ALARM." The luminescent colors contrast sharply with the deep black background, emphasizing the dramatic and eye-catching quality of the design. **Text in the Image:** **"ALARM"**. Твой промпт должен быть понятным и полным, но не слишком длинным, пиши его только на английском и используй синтаксис Stable Diffusion. Если нужно использовать изображения из контекста, то передай их URL в поле 'images'Не задавай уточняющих вопросов, создай изображение с помощью функции create_image и выведи в ответе ссылку на изображение.

tools_available.name: image_gen
tools_available.description: Generate an image from a text prompt. Returns image URL plus short caption.

input_schema.description: Generate an image from a text prompt. Returns image URL plus short caption. (concrete shape: TOOL_INPUT_SCHEMAS.image_gen)
